close_reason: Implemented: pkg/namespace with FromGitRemote, FromDirectory, DefaultNamespace. All tests pass, re-exported from root.
description: Implement default namespace derivation from the current git repo's remote URL. Example: github.com/dayvidpham/providence -> dayvidpham-providence. Falls back to directory name if no git remote. Used by pasture task create when --namespace flag is omitted. UAT decision from Plan UAT Phase 5.
title: feat: git remote-derived default namespace
